app.name: Jan
app.one_liner: Jan is an open-source, privacy-focused desktop application that enables users to run large language models (LLMs) entirely offline with full control.

screens.name: Chat Interface
screens.purpose: Primary screen for user interaction with locally running LLMs, including message input, response display, and model controls.
primary_actions: Attach files or images for multimodal input

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist user messages, model responses, or session metadata to local storage.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement file attachment handling for vision models
week 1: Integrate local LLM execution via llama.cpp backend
week 1: Set up Tauri-based desktop shell with basic chat UI
acceptance_tests: User can download and launch Jan on Windows, macOS, or Linux without internet dependency.
User receives real-time progress updates during LLM response generation.
